parameters.query:
insert into razreshenobot.users (tg_user_id, first_seen_at, last_seen_at)
values ({{ $('FN_NORMALIZE').item.json.tg_user_id }}, now(), now())
on conflict (tg_user_id)
do update set last_seen_at = now()
returning id;

parameters.query:
insert into razreshenobot.update_dedup(update_id)
values ($1)
on conflict do nothing
returning update_id;

parameters.query:
UPDATE razreshenobot.requests
SET delivery_method = 'username'::public.delivery_method,
    delivery_username = '{{$json.text}}'
WHERE id = {{$json.session.active_request_id}}::bigint;
